description: YouTube Music is Google’s music streaming service and web player for songs, albums, playlists, and podcasts. The music.youtube.com domain serves the consumer listening experience rather than a documented developer platform.
summary: No public developer integration surface was found for music.youtube.com. Searches only surfaced YouTube Data API documentation on developers.google.com for YouTube generally, while YouTube Music help/community pages explicitly state that YouTube Music does not have an API.
